message.content:
Test file: src/claim-office.spec.ts
Failing test: "quote for 3 runes + 3 moonstones yields base premium 120 G (two separate blocks: 60 + 60)"
Expected: 137 (120 base + 12 first + 5 fee)
Current error: Expected 137, received 154
Implementation file: src/claim-office.ts

Generalize block adjustment: any component type with exactly 3 alike forms a block at 60G. Apply to both runes and moonstones. Component types are: rune, moonstone (insurance value 250G each = base 25G).

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Refactor after completion.

content.text: I'll analyze the failing test and implement the minimal change needed.
I'll generalize the block adjustment to work for any component type (rune, moonstone) with exactly 3 alike.

content.text:
All tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: Generalized `runeBlockAdjustment` to `blockAdjustment`, which iterates over component types (`rune`, `moonstone`) and applies the block discount (60G for exactly 3 alike) to each independently.
- Result: All tests now pass (11 passing, 35 todo)
- Approach: Minimal generalization — extracted the component types into a constant list and looped over them, summing each block's adjustment. The logic is the same as before but applied per-component-type rather than hardcoded to runes.

Implementation file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-21_08-35-47_claim-office-example-mapping_v4.1-testlist-scope-fix_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts
